zh.lifeSummary: 當Knt Robert Thomas Nichols於1510年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾瑟其波洛福時，他的父親M  John Cole Hyett Nichols35歲，母親Isabel Mary Stradling32歲。他於1535年與Christiana Elinor Norwood在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾瑟其波洛福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾瑟其波洛福享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nichols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Nicholls
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nicols
meanings: English, Scottish, and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Knt Robert Thomas Nichols was born in 1510, in Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, M  John Cole Hyett Nichols, was 35 and his mother, Isabel Mary Stradling, was 32. He married Christiana Elinor Norwood in 1535, in Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1560, in Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Knt Robert Thomas Nichols est né en 1510, à Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, M  John Cole Hyett Nichols, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel Mary Stradling, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Elinor Norwood en 1535, à Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1560, à Sedgeberrow, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Knt Robert Thomas Nichols(이)가 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 세지베로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 M  John Cole Hyett Nichols(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Mary Stradling(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 세지베로에서 Christiana Elinor Norwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 세지베로에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
